mapper.select: SELECT ep.SEQ AS CODE_NO, ep.CODE_NAME FROM EVS_PARAM ep WHERE ep.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ep.ACTIVITY = '1' AND ep.PARAM_TYPE = 'GROUP' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ep.SEQ)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVS_PARAM ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, PARAM_TYPE, CODE_NO, CODE_NAME, FORMULA, REMARK, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, START_STEP, LIST_TYPE, EVS_SCORE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formula, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},200, #{startStep, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{listType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0), #{evsScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_PARAM SET CODE_NO = #{codeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE_NAME = #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FORMULA = #{formula, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = 1, START_STEP = #{startStep, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LIST_TYPE = NVL(#{listType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0), EVS_SCORE = #{evsScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}NULL, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
